body_excerpt: In showNotification of NavigationModeController.java, there is a possible confused deputy due to an unsafe PendingIntent. This could lead to local escalation of privilege that allows actions performed as the System UI with User execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In showNotification of NavigationModeController.java, there is a possible confused deputy due to an unsafe PendingIntent. This could lead to local escalation of privilege that allows actions performed
